name: Abstraction and Generalization
description: Identify the essential structure behind a specific problem and extend it to a broader class.

name: Advanced Proof Tactics
description: Compactness, probabilistic method, double counting, extremality, and topological invariants for hard theorems.

name: Asymptotic Analysis
description: Big-O notation, Laplace method, saddle-point method, Stirling, Watson's lemma for asymptotic expansions.

name: Computational Verification
description: Validate mathematical claims through numeric computation or symbolic algebra before investing proof effort.

name: Conjecture Formulation and Testing
description: Systematic workflow for generating, sharpening, stress-testing, and deciding whether to prove a conjecture.

name: Gaussian Moment Inequalities
description: Bound expectations of products/absolute values of Gaussian variables using permanents, hafnians, and Wick formula.

name: Literature Synthesis
description: Extract, connect, and organize results across multiple papers into a coherent knowledge structure.

name: Math Paper Writing
description: Structure, exposition, LaTeX conventions, and revision workflow for writing rigorous mathematics papers.

name: Mathematical Problem-Solving Heuristics
description: Polya's four-phase framework plus 12 core heuristic moves and Tao-style research heuristics.

name: Proof Strategy Selection
description: Choose the most effective proof technique (direct, contradiction, induction, compactness, etc.) for a given theorem type.

name: Random Zeros and Rice Formula
description: Count expected zeros of random polynomial/analytic/harmonic functions using the Kac-Rice formula.

name: Reading Mathematics Papers
description: Efficient strategies for reading and extracting insight from research papers at different depth levels.

name: Small Deviation Probabilities
description: Estimate P(||X|| < ε) as ε→0 for Gaussian processes via negative moments, blocking, and permanent bounds.

name: SPDE Uniqueness Techniques
description: Yamada-Watanabe, BDSDE, and Malliavin calculus methods for existence and uniqueness of stochastic PDEs.

name: Spin Glass Models and Gaussian Bounds
description: Khatri-Sidak inequality and Gaussian comparison tools for bounding maxima of correlated Gaussian fields.

name: Stochastic Process Fundamentals
description: Brownian motion, martingales, Poisson processes, Gaussian processes, and key comparison inequalities.
